intentSynonyms: find a cheapest flight date in priceline
find cheapest flight date in priceline
find the cheapest flight date in a window in priceline
description: Find the single cheapest date to fly a route within a given date window. Returns the bottom N fares ordered from lowest to highest price, so the caller can pick the best date that fits their schedule. Works for one-way routes; for round-trip price optimization use get_flight_price_calendar with two trips.

origin.description: Origin airport or city code (e.g., JFK, NYC)

destination.description: Destination airport or city code (e.g., LAX, LON)

depart_date_from.description: Start of departure window in YYYY-MM-DD format

depart_date_to.description: End of departure window in YYYY-MM-DD format

top_n.description: Number of cheapest dates to return (default 5, max 30)
